title: ophrys fusca subsp. forestieri
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. forestieri, also known as the Forest Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ophrys fusca subsp. forestieri include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots and leaves in water or oil, and can be used as a treatment for various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
